items.title: 🚨NEW: LA Sparks posted season-worsts in points, offensive rating, and TS% in Monday’s loss. It, understandably, led to a postgame of frustration and bluntness. “Go to rest and get back at it,” Dearica Hamby said. League-leading Minnesota awaits Wednesday. 🔗 justinrusso.substack.c

items.title: Final: Valkyries 78, Sparks 58. Los Angeles fell behind by 24 in the third, made a push to get back in it, but never quite had it. Fewest points scored by the Sparks since they had 57 on Sept. 9, 2021. Shot just 33% and committed 16 turnovers. Sparks fall to 7-7.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Valkyries 78, Sparks 58. Los Angeles fell behind by 24 in the third, made a push to get back in it, but never quite had it. Fewest points scored by the Sparks since they had 57 on Sept. 9, 2021. Shot just 33% and committed 16 turnovers. Sparks fall to 7-7.

items.title: Cameron Brink was down on the floor after rolling her left ankle. Brink was helped up after a while and sat on the bench for a brief period before going back to the locker room.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Cameron Brink was down on the floor after rolling her left ankle. Brink was helped up after a while and sat on the bench for a brief period before going back to the locker room.

items.title: Kelsey Plum has fouled out. Plum finishes with 9 points on just 3-for-10 shooting, her worst offensive outing of the season. The only other time in Plum’s Sparks tenure that she didn’t score in double figures also came in a road loss to the Valkyries last August.

items.title: Sparks trail 25-10 after one. Los Angeles went the final 3:45 without a made basket. Golden State ended on a 17-4 run. Sparks shot 3-for-16. Non-Kelsey Plum Sparks were 1-for-13. Golden State made as many 3s as the Sparks had total baskets. And that’ll do it.

items.title: Mike Brown is on his 5th HC job in the NBA. He's had a pretty good run.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Brown is on his 5th HC job in the NBA. He's had a pretty good run.

In 2007, Cavaliers best season ever at the time (66 wins and the finals).
In 2023, Kings have their best season in 18 years (48 wins + playoffs).
In 2026, Knicks have their best season in 53 years (first NBA title since 1973).

items.title: O'Brien POTD John Brisker. Toledo SF signed w/PIT in ABA in 69+ was legendary tough guy (per bio "heavyweight champ of ABA). Could score (29 ppg 2x) but had drug issues. Signed w/SEA in 72 but cut by 75. Allegedly went to work for Idi Amin & possibly killed in battle in 78.
